titleStmt.title: SII 6.100: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 100. (A.R. No. 143 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti .The letter sa is engraved below the line.sakalaparamavaṁśōdbha
va bhāradvājagōtra khaṭvāṁggadhva
ja vṛṣabhalāṁcana kaṁcipu
rēśvara kaḍuvāypaṟaghōṣaṇa pa
llavakulatilakapadāṁbuja
sēvita Annuvakāmakulādhinā
yaka Anēkabaṁdhujanaśraya pati
hitābharaṇa noḍivaḍisāha
sā¨rjjuna saṁgrāmarāma ḍakku
nūḍlaśāsana śrīveṁgīdēśadēśa is written below the line.cālu
kyanaṁkakāṟa paramaṇḍala
cūṟakāṟa patidēvaguru
dvijabhaktulu kuṟumaṟa
jamuṇḍaina śrīmanmahā
māṇḍalika boddana koḍuku
bhīmanamaṇḍalīkuṇḍu be
javāḍa mallēśvaradēvara
kiccina śāsanamu . māku
nabhivrittigāṁ jakrava¨rtti Iccina bejavāḍa dēvara ceyvu
śrīkāṁttāpriyu liṣṭasiṣṭajanatāśī¨rvva¨rddhanulu dhā[¨rmmi]
kulnākīśōnnatabōgabhāgulu janānaṁdapradu
lvidviṣānīkāraṇyamarutsakhulu bahukalāniṣṇāta
ludyatsitaślōkulu gētaṇḍuṁ dammubaṁggiyu jagalluṁṭhā
kabhaṁggapradulū . Aṁdu girīśukaṁṭe subhaṭāgrani A¨rkkajuka
ṁṭe dāni śrīnaṁddanukaṁṭṭe rūpi suranātunikaṁṭṭe vilāsuṇḍāpa
gānaṁddanukaṁṭṭe śauci nalinapriyukaṁṭṭeṁ bratāpi daṇḍabhrinnaṁdda
nukaṁṭṭe sūnri(ku)tuṇḍu naṁdagu baṁggi dharātalaṁbunanu .
Ā tammabaṁggikini rāmātilakaṁbaina bādamaku nayavinayānvitu
ṇḍu boddaṇḍu budhasaṁprītikaruṇḍaina tammu bhīmaṇḍu nanaṁggāna
Atulitapunyamū¨rttu labhiyātinripālakabhaṁggadulu ja
gaddhitahitasaccaritru ludiyiṁcciri Aṁddu nuṁ dammu bhī
ma ṇḍū¨rjjituṇḍai saptasaṁtatuluṁ jēkoni nilpi dharāmarōttama
pratatiki nagrahāramu lapāramu licce dayānubhāva
nanu . Ādiṁ jeppaṁgaṁbaḍḍa dha¨rmmuvulu dha¨rmmaraṁbhuṇḍai cēse vidyā
dānaṁbu hiraṇyadānamunu bhūdānaṁbu gōdānakanyādānaṁbū
lu nāṁggaṁ būni mahilōnanu puṭṭapuṁbaṭṭanutpādiṁcce
nmaṟi tammubhīmu ṇḍogi satraṁbulu prapalu vekkulunu .Below this is engraved the last line belonging to No. 97 above.
Digital edition of SII 6.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
